content.en:
There were still three Primordial Realms left, and Ye Tian still had to create a life-saving Primordial Control Technique.

Although his strength is very strong, there are definitely many Triple Ancestors who are stronger than him, and there are naturally more means to save his life.

Otherwise, he really encountered the kind of cultivation that raised his cultivation to the limit of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, engraved thirty-six extreme extremes, formed a powerful Primordial Body, and created a top-notch Primordial Control Technique.

So much, he will definitely be killed by the other party.

Therefore, increasing the means of saving life is the king.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, three more Primordial Era years had passed.

And during this period of time, Ye Tian finally created the second Primordial Control Technique, which was specially created for defense, the Primordial Mastery Technique, the Nine Extremes Black Armor.

The Nine Extremes Black Armor involves the Nine Extreme Extremes of Defense, the Five Elements Extreme Extreme, the Space-Time Extreme Extreme, and the Light Extreme Extreme, which brings together the aspects of the Nine Extreme Extremes involved in defense to create the Nine Extremes Black Armor, which can cover the whole body, which is enough to make his defense skyrocket.

......

"The Void God Domain is about to open!"

A will clone of Ye Tian set off and followed the large army of the Void Heavenly Gate to the Void God Domain.

This time, he didn't dare to copy his body in the Void God Domain, otherwise if he was discovered, he wouldn't be able to save his life with his current strength!

When I first came to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, the foundation has not yet been laid, and there is no backer, so it is better to keep a low profile.

Void God Domain.

Outside this small domain, the ancestors of the Quadruple Heavenly Gate and the Fivefold Holy Gate arrived here.

"A lot of ancestors!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, he also sensed the aura of many Quadruple Ancestors, and their strength was extremely terrifying, which was an existence that he could not imagine.

Abrupt.

One after another, the majestic bodies appeared, and the real body didn't seem to be here, but the projection came here, but the breath made the Triple Ancestors tremble one by one, and they didn't dare to look up at them, otherwise the time and space where they were would be frozen, and it would be difficult for them to move.

"Fivefold Ancestor!"

All the Triple Ancestors secretly said in their hearts.

Ye Tian also looked at these Fivefold Primordial Ancestors, this was also the first time he had seen the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors.

How the Fourfold Origin Ancestor became the Fivefold Ancestor, Ye Tian didn't know, but it was definitely very difficult, so countless forces wanted to become the Fivefold Ancestor, but the endless years had passed, and there were only six Fivefold Holy Gates in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain so far!

Moreover, the secret of how the Fourfold Ancestor became the Fivefold Ancestor has not been passed on so far, and it is conceivable that the Fivefold Holy Gate has a very strict control over the inheritance of knowledge in this regard.

If the Quadruple Ancestor wants to become a Fivefold Ancestor, it is too difficult!

I saw these fivefold ancestors wave their hands, and one after another portals appeared, leading to the Void God Domain.

Then, the phantoms of these fivefold ancestors dissipated.

For them, it's just to open the Void God Domain in the air, and they naturally don't pay attention to the follow-up things.

"Enter the Void God Domain, you will be excluded after ten days of the Origin Domain, and you can't come out in advance. "

The fourfold ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate said.

Instantly, a Triple Origin Ancestor rushed into the Void God Domain.

And Ye Tian also entered the Void God Domain.

......

The void of the Void God Domain is no different from the outside world, after all, this is originally one of the countless small domains of the Shangling Origin Domain, but due to the special nature of this area, the resources born are too rich, so it is banned as one of the treasure lands.

"Find the treasure!"

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he first covered his breath, and then slowly began to look for treasures.

I have to say that the treasure resources here are very rich.

Soon, Ye Tian found a treasure called the Rising Sun Golden Crystal, this treasure could refine the body of the Triple Origin Ancestor, and the value was very high.

As time slowly passed, one treasure after another fell into Ye Tian's hands.

But soon, he encountered the other Triple Ancestors.

That Triple Origin Ancestor sensed Ye Tian and did not choose to avoid it, and seeing that Ye Tian's cultivation was very low, it didn't take long to break through the Triple Origin Ancestor.

In terms of cultivation, Ye Tian could only be regarded as the peak of the early stage of the Triple Ancestor, not even the middle stage.

And this Triple Origin Ancestor was a powerhouse at the peak of the Triple Origin Ancestor, so he directly attacked Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't know the identity of this Triple Ancestor, but he dared to make a move on him, and Ye Tian was naturally not polite, and directly shot with all his might.

"Primordial Black Light!"

Ye Tian struck with all his strength.

Rumble!

The primordial black light hit the body of the Triple Ancestor, directly shattering the layers of defense on the opponent's body, directly piercing the opponent's Primordial Ancestor's body, and shattering the body to death.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian still thought that the other party was so powerful, but it turned out to be so weak, and he dared to attack him?

......

Fourfold Heavenly Gate - Nine Heavenly Gates.

Feng Yu Ancestor's true body opened his eyes, and his face showed a look of shock.

"I was killed in seconds by a guy from the early stage of the Triple Ancestor!!!"

He thought that his strength was not weak, and he was very cautious, this time he was picking soft persimmons and pinching them, seeing that Ye Tian was only in the early stage of the Triple Ancestor, it was obviously not long after he broke through to the Triple Ancestor.

Moreover, with the cultivation of the early stage of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, he came here, and it should be the Triple Primordial Ancestor among those weaker Quadruple Heavenly Gates.

As a result, the other party actually created the Primordial Control Technique, and killed him in one blow in seconds.

"It's really unfortunate to meet a demonic genius!"

Feng Yu Yuan Ancestor said helplessly.

......

Time passed slowly, and when Ye Tian was looking for treasures, he also encountered a lot of triple ancestors.

Moreover, he used his copying talent to constantly perceive his surroundings, and if he sensed the terrifying strength of the Triple Ancestor, he would run away directly and not meet the other party.

Therefore, from beginning to end, he did not encounter a Triple Ancestor who was too powerful.

"I just found three Primordial Spirit Holy Fruits, two of which were obtained from other Triple Primordial Ancestors, it seems that even if it is the Void God Domain, it is not easy to obtain the Primordial Spirit Sacred Fruit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's still early, though.

Ten Origin Domain Days is not a very short time, but an incomparably long time, which is enough for Ye Tian to find a lot of treasures.

Bang!!!!

In the distance, a battle broke out.

Ye Tian spied on the two Triple Ancestors who were fighting, and these two Triple Ancestors were very terrifying, and they all showed the bodies of the incomparably terrifying Primordial Ancestors, and their huge bodies were filled with an aura of extreme extremes.

"Seventy-two Extreme Extremes!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Obviously, these two should be the Holy Sons of the Fivefold Holy Gate, otherwise they would not have such a terrifying background.

After all, the Quadruple Heavenly Gate can't cultivate such a demon!

Moreover, their shots are all a kind of primordial control skills, and their combat effectiveness is too terrifying!

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian didn't watch the battle here, and fled directly, otherwise if he was affected, he would still not be able to compete with his current strength.

After going out this time, I have a good retreat, and only then can I hope to compete with the top threefold ancestors of these fivefold holy gates.
